temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A soldier in full camouflage, with a bloody and gruesome wound on his face, stumbles through a dark doorway. He wears a green beret and a tactical vest, and his face is covered in blood and gore, with one eye appearing bloodshot. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a horrific and violent event has occurred, introducing a character who is severely injured and in distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build.)
(00:02-00:05) A rapid montage of extreme close-ups shows a woman's face in distress. Her eyes are wide with fear and sweat is beaded on her skin. The shots are dark and fragmented, focusing on her terrified expression. (Storyline: This montage introduces a second character who is clearly terrified, creating a parallel narrative of fear and suggesting she is either a witness to or the cause of the violence.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful score continues, punctuated by sharp, percussive sound effects that sync with the cuts.)
